Title: Project Documentation & Requirement Analysis
Body: Create README, user stories, feature list, architecture overview and setup guide.

Title: Repository Setup & Git Workflow
Body: Initialize repository, gitignore, issue templates and PR template.

Title: Design Database & API Specification
Body: Design User, Vlog and Like entities. Document API contracts.

Title: Authentication Module
Body: Implement registration, login, logout and route protection.

Title: Create Vlog Feature
Body: Allow authenticated users to create vlogs.

Title: View Vlogs Feature
Body: Display all vlogs and single vlog details.

Title: Edit Vlog Feature
Body: Allow owners to update existing vlogs.

Title: Delete Vlog Feature
Body: Allow owners to delete existing vlogs.

Title: View Count Tracking
Body: Track and display vlog view counts.

Title: User Profile Page
Body: Display profile details and user-created vlogs.

Title: UI/UX Improvements
Body: Responsive design, loading states, empty states and error handling.

Title: Application Testing
Body: Perform end-to-end testing for all implemented features.

Title: Final Documentation & Screenshots
Body: Update README, add screenshots and deployment instructions.
